summary: If AscendC verify reports op_kernel/<op>.cpp missing or 'no input files' during build, first check OPP permission setup instead of renaming sources. In this case the generated project and kernel file were valid; the fix was to export ASCEND_OPP_PATH to a user-readable overlay that contains vendors/config.ini and symlinks to the toolkit opp assets before rerunning verify.
